target: 17. Hope
As for how Shide and the others will make their move...
Shide said that my power is the ability to observe parallel worlds.
Parallel worlds?
When a time traveler goes back to the past and alters the future, the timeline branches off...
And another world is born, parallel to the world the traveler originally came from... That's the concept.
In other words, there's a world where Mio and I died, and a world where we were saved...
Yeah. And there are an infinite number of parallel worlds, as many as there are possibilities.
In other words, when Shinpei-san dies, the world is "copy-pasted" multiple times, and only your consciousness moves to one of them...
And the world up until that point ceases to exist, right?
So normally there would be an infinite number of parallel worlds, but all of them disappear except for the one with the observer-- meaning Shinpei's consciousness.
...I understand that much, but... What about Ushio? How do we know she's going to appear!?
Yes... Let's call the initial state of Ushio that appears on the 24th "Ushio"...
I first met Ushio on the day of the festival in the 3rd loop. After the massacre that followed, I looped, but--
For some reason she stuck to me, and came to the 4th loop's world with not just her consciousness, but her physical body as well.
I see...!! Ushio should have originally existed in the 4th loop's world too. And the Ushio from the 3rd loop also arrived there...
At that point, there were two of Ushio's shadows.
That's right. And as for Ushio, at this current time of 5 AM on July 24th--
She should be drifting somewhere in the sea, gradually recovering from the damage she took from Haine.
That's the damage she took trying to protect Shiori-chan while swimming in the sea... Damn it...!
If she's like me and Haine, when she loops, only her consciousness should transfer to her body drifting in the sea, but--
That's not what's happening.
So, in this world, there's the Ushio from the 9th loop drifting in the sea, and--
This seashell--meaning the "Ushio" from the 3rd loop who looped with me, existing at the same time.
We should assume that Shinpei--Haine, is also thinking the same thing...
Right before she disappeared, Ushio read Shide's mind. There, she learned that they were thinking "Ushio will appear on the 24th"--
And that's what she bet on... That's what I think.
Hey, hey... That's an assumption on top of an assumption. That's just a "wish."
This is the first time we've reached the "24th" since the loops with Ushio started. No one can be certain.
But Ushio alone should have known.
How can you be so sure?
Until a moment ago, it was a wish... But now, I'm certain.
Please look at this...
Ah! The seashell is moving...!?
No matter where I place this seashell, it moves slightly towards the "south".
Since when!? This is...
It moved the most clearly around 3 AM, and now it's gotten a lot weaker.
The rising tide...!!
Yes! To wash up on the south-facing Omoto Beach, a current flowing from south to north is necessary.
Pulled by the moon's gravity, the seawater of the Seto Inland Sea flows in and out of the strait...
During the rising tide when the water comes in, the current flows in exactly that direction.
I see...! In other words, Ushio is currently in the Kii Channel, not Osaka Bay or the Seto Inland Sea!
Yes... This shell is reacting to Ushio...!!
She was close by... until just a little while ago...
Low and high tides happen twice a day each! The second high tide should be around 6 PM!!
At that time... Ushio will approach this island again...!!
Yes...!! I met Ushio after 8 o'clock, but she must wash ashore before then!
From Shide's perspective, the already threatening Ushio might become two...
They can't overlook this concern... Shide will probably come himself... with full force...!!
But they don't know Ushio's exact location. They must be half-doubting whether Ushio will really appear.
Haine said she couldn't sense Ushio-san's presence because she's bugged, right...
But we have certainty...!! This difference is our chance to win!
If we miss this chance, we will completely lose Ushio.
Let's go get her...
Yeah...!!
I can see some hope now.
Yeah!
Then everyone, please proceed according to the plan from here on out...!!
Hello... Ajiro-kun?
Koyuba-san? I have a little favor to ask...
